channel.title: Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin
channel.description: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents from 7 sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, and MSNBC. Published 6 times daily with threat level assessments, critical alerts, and patch advisories. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.
channel.itunes:author: Cybersecurity Announcement
channel.itunes:summary: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents from 7 sources: The Hacker News, The CyberWire, Unit 42, CrowdStrike, CNN, NBC News, and MSNBC. Published 6 times daily with threat level assessments, critical alerts, and patch advisories. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.

item.title: 🛡️ Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 30, 2026 (6:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Threat Level: 74% (High/Orange), up from 72%. Virtual phone bank bypass, Citrix NetScaler recon, nation-state attacks doubled, Oracle Fusion RCE, Venom Stealer, Wing FTP deadline.
item.itunes:summary: Threat Level: 74% (High/Orange), up from 72%. Virtual phone bank bypass, Citrix NetScaler recon, nation-state attacks doubled, Oracle Fusion RCE, Venom Stealer, Wing FTP deadline.
